overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Dishonored 2 showing a player character walking through a dark Victorian steampunk city at night. The player ascends a stone staircase, passes through streets with tram tracks, and approaches a large gate with banners celebrating 'The Reign of Delilah Copperspoon'.

events.description: begins ascending the stone staircase from the courtyard
reaches the top of the stairs, revealing the street above

agents.ego_description: walking through a dimly lit courtyard and climbing a wide stone staircase

notable_agents.action: sitting on the stairs, resting with hands on knees

entered.detail: wide stone stairs with ornate metal railings leading upward between stone walls
historic stone buildings with arched doorways surrounding the lower courtyard
stacked wooden crates and debris in the courtyard corner
ornate wrought iron railings lining the staircase

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dimly lit stone courtyard at night. The player approaches and begins ascending a wide stone staircase, passing an NPC sitting on the steps. The environment features historic stone architecture with metal railings and scattered wooden crates, illuminated by sparse artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: Victorian street with illuminated poster boards

events.description: exits the stairwell onto the street level, passing a guard by a poster board
camera tilts upward to look at the towering buildings overhead

agents.ego_description: reaching the top of the stairs, passing a guard, and looking up at the architecture before proceeding down the street

notable_agents.action: guard standing by the poster board, holding a weapon and observing the area

entered.detail: illuminated display board with wanted posters including one labeled 'WANTED'
metal tram tracks running down the center of the cobblestone street
towering multi-story stone buildings with ornate balconies and tall windows
ornate cast iron street lamp casting warm yellow light

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the staircase onto a street level, the player passes a guard standing by an illuminated poster board. The scene opens to reveal tram tracks running down a cobblestone street flanked by towering Victorian buildings. The camera tilts up to admire the architecture before continuing forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: main thoroughfare with massive tree roots and tram tracks

events.description: begins walking down the center of the street following the tram tracks
approaches area with large red canopy and massive tree roots growing over buildings

agents.ego_description: walking down the street along the tram tracks, passing other pedestrians and observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: civilian in red clothing walking along the left side of the street
guard walking ahead on the tram tracks in the same direction

entered.detail: enormous gnarled tree roots growing over and around the buildings
metal bridge structure connecting buildings overhead
red fabric canopy extending over part of the street

segments.scene_description: The player walks down a wide street following tram tracks, passing other pedestrians including a civilian in red and a guard. The environment features massive tree roots engulfing the right side of the street, an elevated walkway overhead, and a red canopy in the distance. The tall Victorian buildings now loom on the left as the player progresses.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand entrance gate with mechanical doors

events.description: approaches the large gate with bright spotlights and hanging banners
enters through the massive mechanical doors of the gate

agents.ego_description: approaching the imposing gate and entering through the large mechanical doors

notable_agents.action: body lying dead on the cobblestones near the gate entrance

entered.detail: massive fortified gate with green copper columns and mechanical components
vertical banners reading 'THE REIGN OF DELILAH COPPERSPOON' with portrait
large industrial doors with visible pistons and gears, partially open
poster display on the wall showing wanted notices

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a grand fortified gate illuminated by bright spotlights, with banners celebrating 'The Reign of Delilah Copperspoon' hanging overhead. A dead body lies on the cobblestones near the entrance. The player walks between the massive mechanical doors with pistons and gears, entering the dark interior beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a secluded stone courtyard into the heart of a fortified Victorian city at night. It begins by ascending a wide stone staircase past a seated NPC, moving through a dimly lit area of historic architecture and wooden crates. As the camera emerges onto the street level, the view opens to reveal cobblestones and tram tracks flanked by towering buildings, with the camera tilting upward to take in the scale of the architecture. The movement continues down the wide thoroughfare, passing pedestrians and massive tree roots that engulf the roadside beneath an elevated walkway. Finally, the path leads toward a grand fortified gate illuminated by spotlights and banners celebrating the Reign of Delilah Copperspoon, passing a body on the ground before moving through massive mechanical doors into a dark interior.
